strengths: 15+ years across full-stack, with recent TypeScript/Node.js and React experience at Optilyz and re:cinq
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) at re:cinq
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth in Kotlin; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
Cloud exposure appears AWS-only via CDK; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes production ownership beyond GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well-rounded experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and AWS, plus current hands-on work in AI agent tooling that aligns closely with the role's internal automation focus. Engineering craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, mentoring) matches the team's quality bar. Gaps are primarily around explicit Nest.js and Vitest exposure and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, though the breadth of languages and frameworks suggests these are learnable.
